title: Hashtags not rendered: Mastodon requires tag array and pre-linked HTML
description: Plain text #hashtag in content is not clickable in Mastodon. Mastodon requires: 1) hashtag linked in HTML as #name, 2) a 'tag' array on the Note object with {type: Hashtag, href, name}. Need to detect #word patterns in content and produce both.
close_reason: Hashtags and mentions now render correctly in Mastodon — verified live against mastodon.social
